# clo_dbaas_nodes (Data Source)

Fetches the list of nodes in a dbaas cluster

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "clo_dbaas_nodes" "cluster_nodes" {
  cluster_id = "3f2504e0-4f89-41d3-9a0c-0305e82c3301"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster_id` (String) ID of the dbaas cluster that owns the nodes

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `result` (List of Object) The object that holds the results (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--result))

<a id="nestedatt--result"></a>
### Nested Schema for `result`

Read-Only:

- `cluster_id` (String)
- `created_in` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `private_ip` (String)
- `role` (String)
- `status` (String)
